name: THYROID ADENOMA
definition: COLLOID NODULE = ADENOMATOUS HYPERPLASIA DEGENERATIVE INVOLUTED NODULE monoclonal tumor arising from follicular epithelium

demographics.Path: single lesion with well-developed fibrous capsule

dominant_finding: round / oval mass of low attenuation with enhancement
discriminating_features: round / oval mass of low attenuation with enhancement
often multiple nodules by US / scintigraphy / surgery
solid form = incompletely encapsulated, poorly demarcated nodules merging with
cystic form (= colloid cyst) = anechoic areas in nodule ← hemorrhage / colloid

general: round / oval mass of low attenuation with enhancement
often multiple nodules by US / scintigraphy / surgery
solid form = incompletely encapsulated, poorly demarcated nodules merging with
cystic form (= colloid cyst) = anechoic areas in nodule ← hemorrhage / colloid
"halo" sign = complete hypoechoic ring with regular border surrounding isoechoic solid

clinical.Rx: surgical hemithyroidectomy (→ 15-30% risk of malignancy if diagnosed on FNAB)
